templates.title: Prepare stakeholder update
templates.description: Summarize the current board state and the next delivery milestone.

tips.title: Keep filters in the URL
tips.body: Shareable filters make board views reviewable and reproducible.

tips.title: Batch repetitive updates
tips.body: Bulk operations should use store.batch() so they schedule one render instead of many.

tips.title: Use delegated board actions
tips.body: Move and delete controls should be handled at the board container level to keep dynamic lists simple.
